title: Fixed log prob result generation

step_plan.summary: Add a post-construction validation in the OpenAI API protocol to enforce per-token logprob alignment across token_logprobs, tokens, top_logprobs, and text_offset for CompletionLogProbs, ensuring correct merging behavior when multiple tokens are produced per choice.

steps.operation: Attach a post-construction model validator to CompletionLogProbs to enforce per-token alignment
steps.reason: Ensure token_logprobs, tokens, top_logprobs, and optional text_offset have matching lengths so that per-token logprob data remains correctly aligned when multiple tokens are produced for a single choice. This prevents mismerged or misinterpreted logprob data in the API contract.
steps.side_effects: API response validation becomes stricter; may require updating or extending unit tests; potential downstream impact on clients consuming per-token logprobs; no changes to model inference logic.
